/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  --no-gnu-unique -Wreturn-type -O3 -DNDEBUG    -Wl,--disable-new-dtags   -shared -Wl,-soname,libCnoidAssimpPlugin.so -o ../../lib/choreonoid-2.2/libCnoidAssimpPlugin.so CMakeFiles/CnoidAssimpPlugin.dir/AssimpPlugin.cpp.o   -L/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib  -L/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib/choreonoid-2.2  -L/usr/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib:/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib/choreonoid-2.2:/usr/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu: ../../lib/libCnoidBase.so.2.2 ../../lib/libCnoidAssimpSceneLoader.so.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Svg.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5X11Extras.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.12.8 ../../lib/libCnoidUtil.so.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a -lpthread -lm -ldl -lstdc++fs -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib
